items.title: Farmers push for stronger protections in renewable energy benefit policy

items.title: Queensland maritime authorities criticised for 'slow' wrecked boats salvage
items.summary: The vessel 7 Wonder has sat wrecked at Rose Bay in north Queensland for more than two months. Locals say they have been picking up rubbish from the boat daily, but maritime authorities say local salvage contractors are "stretched".

items.title: PVC prices soar amid petrol and gas supply issues as Iran war continues

items.title: Donald Trump says Iran could be 'taken out in one night' if deal not reached by looming deadline
items.summary: Donald Trump says the "entire country" of Iran will be "taken out" if no deal is reached by Wednesday morning (AEST), ratcheting up his threat to target civilian infrastructure and brushing off concerns it would be a war crime.

items.title: How clean should a rental property be before moving in?
items.summary: Having to clean a new rental property before settling in is a common experience for renters, but landlords have obligations when it comes to rental cleanliness upon moving in.

items.title: Tree proximity to property may hurt sale price, analysis in Australia's biggest city shows

items.title: Cape Grim's 50-year air record reveals true scale of humans' impact on planet
